title: 『オペレーション：エンジョイ縁日』

text_block_list.text:
On the way home after spending the day out with
Mihono Bourbon, we spot a festival at a nearby
shrine.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Detecting that congestion is at five times normal
levels. In other words, it is a huge turnout.
choice_data_list: Do you want to check it out?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No. I was merely scanning for which stalls have
the highest customer density, as my data banks
currently lack this information.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The yakisoba stall appears the most crowded.
This is peculiar, considering it can be prepared at
home.
Groooowl...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The visual input has stimulated my stomach,
creating a natural bodily reflex.
choice_data_list: Let's get a closer look!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. If that is your desire, then I will
accompany you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Gulp...
choice_data_list: How is it?
How is it?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Delicious. The yakisoba is "piping hot," just as the
stall's name suggests. However, it has a richer
flavor than regular yakisoba.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I wonder if the other food stalls share the same phenomenon... Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Shooting Gallery Attendant
text_block_list.text:
Come one, come all! Help your digestion along
with a little target practice at the shooting
gallery, and win some fabulous prizes while you're
at it!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Shooting Gallery Attendant
text_block_list.text:
The nigh-unobtainable grand prize is a
take-all-you-want ticket! You'll be sure to please
that special someone at your side!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, since you resolved my empty stomach
dilemma, I would like to request permission to
grant your desires next.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This shooting gallery seems to have the perfect
prize that will let me show you my gratitude.
choice_data_list: Shall we give it a shot, then?
Shall we give it a shot, then?
Nah, let's try all the other food instead.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This shooting gallery seems to have the perfect
prize that will let me show you my gratitude.
choice_data_list: Shall we give it a shot, then?
Shall we give it a shot, then?
Nah, let's try all the other food instead.

text_block_list.text:
She starts shooting in an attempt to win the grand
prize, but...

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Aw, missed again. She's failed ten times, but she's
still not giving up.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Adjusting range by five millimeters. Adding three
degrees to firing angle... Recalculating
trajectory...
choice_data_list:
It'll be curfew soon, so we'd better start
heading home.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Understood. I have no issue. Because the next
shot will be the last.
Bang! Thunk.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Target destroyed.

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! She totally called that one!

text_block_list.name: Shooting Gallery Attendant
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Looks like it's your victory, young lady!
Take as many prizes as you want!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Very well, then. Trainer, what would you like?
choice_data_list: Pick whatever you want, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Whatever I want?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. Please wait.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I selected matching items that I think are perfect
for us. Here.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I hope it fits your hand.

I remove the prize from the box and gently hold
it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? It's a hand grip. How does it
feel?
choice_data_list: Um... good?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. Now we can train and improve
together.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Mission complete.

We return to the academy while working out with
our matching hand grips.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That is only what I desire, and thus, it will only
benefit me... It is no way to thank you.
choice_data_list: Whatever makes you happy makes me happy.
Whatever makes you happy makes me happy.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: You want to see me happy...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. I will eat with all my might if that is
what you wish.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Commencing food stall conquest. Let's start with
that taiyaki stall.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: Wh-what is it?
Wh-what is it?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Report—flavors are beyond expected levels,
resulting in a short-circuit in my thought process.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am unable to identify any special cooking
techniques or seasoning used... This must be an
ordinary taiyaki.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Similar to the yakisoba, its deliciousness
perplexes me. Why does eating it make me feel
so elated?
choice_data_list: Maybe because you're having fun?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I see. I have seen data on this before.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Feelings and flavor can operate together. I
believe the words were "happiness is the best
seasoning."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Let us have okonomiyaki next. I am intrigued as
to whether it will surpass my expectations as well.
We continue ordering from the food stalls.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Burp... Consumption of cotton candy complete.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
We've visited every stall, and my energy levels
are fully replenished.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
What about you, Trainer? Did the experience
meet your expectations?
choice_data_list: Of course! I had a lot of fun!
Of course! I had a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Then my mission is complete. Currently saving this
experience to my memory logs.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Recording today's events along with all the
various culinary experiences that I enjoyed with
you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I feel like if I access these logs, I'll be able to run
up the steepest incline indefinitely.

Today's food doesn't only replenish Mihono
Bourbon's energy levels, but also fills her heart
with joy.
